en-US.title: PepRep
en-US.subtitle: Peptide Calculator & Log
en-US.description:
PepRep is a measurement instrument for peptide reconstitution arithmetic and personal record-keeping.

You enter every number: vial amount, water volume and the dose you intend to draw. PepRep shows the calculation in both millilitres and U-100 syringe units, keeps the working visible, checks the selected syringe capacity and preserves an auditable history of what you log.

WHAT PEPREP DOES
• Calculates from your own vial, water and dose inputs
• Shows concentration, volume, U-100 units and worked steps
• Tracks vials using an append-only inventory ledger
• Supports plans and local reminders you define
• Keeps immutable history with voided corrections
• Exports your records and creates password-encrypted backups
• Offers optional encrypted cloud backup without automatic sync

WHAT PEPREP DOES NOT DO
• No dose, treatment, protocol, cycle or stack recommendations
• No diagnosis or medical supervision
• No advertising or behavioural analytics
• No account required for calculation or local records

PepRep is a measurement tool, not medical advice. Check every result against your vial and syringe and follow guidance from an appropriately qualified healthcare professional.
en-US.promoText: Visible reconstitution arithmetic and an auditable record—calculated only from the numbers you enter.
